name: Fruit Salad W/Dried Cherry Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 1 small Granny Smith apple, thinly sliced
1 small Orange, peeled and cut into sections
recipeInstructions:
1. For dressing: Whisk together vinegar, oil, salt, and pepper.
2. Arrange greens on serving plate.
3. Add cherries, fruits, and cashews.
4. Serve with vinaigrette dressing.
Dried Cherry Vinaigrette:
Combine 1 cup of dried cherries with 2 cups white wine vinegar in a glass container. Cover and allow to steep for 2 days at room temperature. Heat just to boiling point, strain through cheesecloth. Cool and store in tightly sealed container.
